author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Empulse is the Splitgate Team's Take on Titanfall 2
Jean-Luc got hands-on with 1047's latest game Empulse, and spoke with the CEO about how the failure of Splitgate 2 informed their choice to not go free-to-play.

text:
7 Minutes of Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy Gameplay Trailer
Watch 7 minutes of gameplay from Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy, coming August 27. 

Rely on your agility to overcome deadly enemies: unleash powerful strikes, master your arsenal, and navigate treacherous puzzles steeped in Minoan myths.
